title: action-comments step result
description: Sidecar schema for the action-comments skill.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

ci_mode.description: Whether the skill ran in autonomous CI mode

comments_resolved.description: Number of review comments applied or edited

comments_skipped.description: Number of comments skipped by user (or autonomously in CI)

comments_outdated.description: Number of comments auto-skipped as outdated

comments_replied.description: Number of reply comments posted to the PR/MR (CI mode only, 0 in interactive)
